title: RXVY ANTI CHEAT
description: Protect your server with RXVYAntiCheat—a high-performance, light-weight security solution featuring "Honey Pot" ore traps and advanced movement detection to stop hackers without compromising your server's TPS.
body:
RXVYAntiCheat is a specialized security suite built for modern Minecraft servers that demand high-speed performance alongside rock-solid protection. While many anti-cheats cause significant server lag with heavy calculations, RXVYAntiCheat is optimized to catch the most common game-breaking hacks while remaining invisible to your legitimate player base.

Core Features
💎 Advanced "Honey Pot" Anti-Xray
Unlike standard obfuscators that hide ores, RXVYAntiCheat generates fake "buried" diamond ores only visible to those using X-ray mods. When a cheater tries to mine these traps, the system flags them instantly.

🏃 Adaptive Movement Detection
Our custom algorithms identify and block Speed, Fly, and NoFall hacks. The system is fine-tuned to allow for natural player movements like jumping and sprinting, reducing false positives while catching true offenders.

⚔️ Combat & Utility Security
Includes strict checks for Reach, AutoClicker, and FastPlace to ensure a fair PvP and building environment for everyone.

💬 Modern Chat Filtering
Built-in protection against spam and toxicity keeps your community friendly and your chat logs clean.

🛡️ Admin-Friendly Alerts
A streamlined notification system alerts staff members in real-time with specific violation counts, allowing for quick and accurate moderation.

Why RXVYAntiCheat?
In the current Minecraft landscape, server performance is everything. RXVYAntiCheat was developed specifically for the rxvysmp.net environment to solve the problem of "bloated" security plugins. By focusing on smart detection rather than constant background scanning, it provides a clean, fair experience that won't lag your world.

Support & Community
If you encounter any issues or have suggestions for new detection modules, join our official community Discord for real-time support:
https://discord.gg/Xx8h2Th8qv
